title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah says let us reaffirm Bharat’s timeless ethos of living in harmony with nature on World Wild life Day
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah says let us reaffirm Bharat’s timeless ethos of living in harmony with nature on World Wild life Day

From the majestic tiger to the smallest species, every life form sustains our ecological balance
The day strengthens the nation’s resolve to protect and preserve wildlife for generations to come

Posted On:
03 MAR 2026 1:15PM by PIB Delhi

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah today called upon citizens to reaffirm Bharat’s timeless ethos of living in harmony with nature on the occasion of World Wildlife Day.

In a post on X, Shri Amit Shah said, "On World Wildlife Day, let us reaffirm Bharat’s timeless ethos of living in harmony with nature. From the majestic tiger to the smallest species, every life form sustains our ecological balance. May this day strengthen our resolve to protect and preserve wildlife for generations to come."

On
#WorldWildlifeDay
, let us reaffirm Bharat’s timeless ethos of living in harmony with nature.
From the majestic tiger to the smallest species, every life form sustains our ecological balance. May this day strengthen our resolve to protect and preserve wildlife for generations…
— Amit Shah (@AmitShah)
March 3, 2026

***

RK/RR/PR/PS
